text: Being here, I am enveloped by an air of curiosity and anticipation. The quiet, modern architectural space with its glass walls, geometric furniture, and experimental displays evokes a sense of both order and creative chaos. As I engage with the R+D exhibit about humans and machines coexisting, I feel as though I am witnessing the perpetual dialogue between the known and the unknown—the present and the possible. A gentle unease tempers my excitement, as if I am an experiment myself, pondering how much of my own existence is shaped by the very technologies and designs celebrated here.
